## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or documented why they were not needed.
- [ ] I checked that no private case data, secrets, model weights, or build artifacts are included.
- [ ] I added screenshots or device notes for UI/runtime changes, if applicable.

## Notes

List device assumptions, model-pack assumptions, storage/performance risks, or follow-up work.
